problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
